iphone-wallpapers.title: iPhone Wallpapers
iphone-wallpapers.desc: Browse and download built-in iPhone wallpapers from early generations to the latest iPhone models. Includes HD and 4K options, optimized for different screen sizes and lock screen layouts.
iphone-wallpapers.subTitle: Built-in iPhone wallpapers in HD and 4K

ios-wallpapers.title: iOS Wallpapers
ios-wallpapers.desc: Explore iOS stock wallpapers from iOS 1 to the latest version, organized by release. Find classic and modern Apple designs with high-resolution downloads for iPhone users.
ios-wallpapers.subTitle: All iOS default wallpapers by version

ipad-wallpapers.title: iPad Wallpapers
ipad-wallpapers.desc: Discover built-in iPad wallpapers for iPad Pro, iPad Air, and iPad mini. Download HD and 4K images tailored for larger displays, perfect for home and lock screens.
ipad-wallpapers.subTitle: Built-in iPad wallpapers for all models

ipados-wallpapers.title: iPadOS Wallpapers
ipados-wallpapers.desc: Get iPadOS default wallpapers from iPadOS 13 to the newest release. All wallpapers are grouped by version with high-quality downloads for iPad users and collectors.
ipados-wallpapers.subTitle: iPadOS stock wallpapers by release

macos-wallpapers.title: macOS Wallpapers
macos-wallpapers.desc: Download built-in macOS wallpapers from classic Mac OS X to the newest macOS versions. High-resolution desktop backgrounds for MacBook, iMac, and external monitors.
macos-wallpapers.subTitle: Built-in macOS desktop wallpapers in high resolution

mac-wallpapers.title: Mac Wallpapers
mac-wallpapers.desc: Browse built-in and device-specific Mac wallpapers for MacBook Pro, MacBook Air, iMac, and more. Includes crisp HD to 5K desktop backgrounds for Apple fans.
mac-wallpapers.subTitle: Built-in Mac wallpapers for MacBook and iMac

new-year-wallpapers.title: Apple New Year Wallpapers
new-year-wallpapers.desc: Explore Apple New Year and Lunar New Year wallpapers from past campaigns. Download festive built-in system designs in high quality for iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
new-year-wallpapers.subTitle: Apple New Year and Lunar New Year wallpaper collection

wwdc-wallpapers.title: WWDC Wallpapers
wwdc-wallpapers.desc: Find built-in WWDC wallpapers from Apple developer conferences across different years. Download keynote visuals and event-themed artwork in high resolution.
wwdc-wallpapers.subTitle: Built-in WWDC wallpapers by year
